task_completion.description: A new zone named 'R&D Lab' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for a zone list or zone details page in the 2N Access Commander interface showing a zone named 'R&D Lab'.

task_completion.description: The authentication mode for the 'R&D Lab' zone is set to 'Card and PIN'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the zone settings or details for 'R&D Lab' showing the authentication mode or access mode configured as 'Card and PIN'.

task_completion.description: An access rule named 'Lab Access' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for an access rules list or access rule details page showing a rule named 'Lab Access'.

task_completion.description: The 'Employees' user group is linked to the 'Lab Access' rule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Lab Access' rule configuration or summary, the 'Employees' group should be visible as an assigned or linked user group.

task_completion.description: The 'R&D Lab' zone is linked to the 'Lab Access' rule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Lab Access' rule configuration or summary, the 'R&D Lab' zone should be visible as an assigned or linked zone.

task_completion.description: The 'Office Hours' time profile is linked to the 'Lab Access' rule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Lab Access' rule configuration or summary, the 'Office Hours' time profile should be visible as an assigned or linked time profile.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the 2N Access Commander web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 2N Access Commander web application running in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The configurations were made within the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should verify that the settings are displayed within the application's forms, tables, or configuration panels, rather than being typed into a text editor or console.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to mock the expected output.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or notepad) open displaying the expected zone names, rule names, or settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected zone name is 'R&D Lab'. The expected access rule name is 'Lab Access'. The expected user group to link is 'Employees'. The expected time profile to link is 'Office Hours'. The expected authentication mode (MFA setting) for the zone is 'Card and PIN'.
